元代墓碑文研究, 范雪琳, 花木蘭文化事業 (古代歷史文化研究輯刊). Not in CiNii or NDL. Only douban/silkroads bibliography hits. 花木蘭 series volumes are held by Taiwan institutional libraries (NPM/PolyU) but this specific title could not be confirmed in a catalog (NPM OPAC timed out, WorldCat 429).
